holdings.infoBox: GASZ is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 15.15%, GE Vernova at 10.17%, Woodward at 5.90%, Generac Holdings at 5.47%, and Kinder Morgan at 5.07%.

overview.description: The Corgi Natural Gas Power & Turbines ETF (GASZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. GASZ.L is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to companies from around the world involved in the natural gas power generation and turbine ecosystem. GASZ was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
